spots.name: Under the Bridge Hơi (Bia Hơi Việt Pháp)
spots.address: Le Van Linh Street, Hoan Kiem Ward
spots.description: Placed under a train bridge, unique location. Beer is mid but it's a good place to people watch.

spots.name: Flower Valley Hơi (Bia hơi Thung Lũng hoa Hồ Tây)
spots.address: 3RF9+MXM, Sen Hồ Tây, Tây Hồ
spots.description: Lakeside bia hơi with nice views, at the side of the flower valley

spots.name: Bicycle Hơi (Bia Song Dần)
spots.address: Phố Vệ Hồ, Tay Ho Ward
spots.description: They seem to rent bicycles here, so it's a Hơi of convenience. It's street side with lots of uncles playing checkers.

spots.name: Bia 10/10
spots.address: 83 P. Trịnh Công Sơn, Tây Hồ
spots.description: Lanterns, street side and inside restaurant

spots.name: Bamboo Hơi
spots.address: 15 Trinh Cong Son
spots.description: Not great

spots.name: Bia Cường Hói
spots.address: 1 P. Trích Sài, Tây Hồ
spots.description: Very lively, lakeside, great food

spots.name: Bia Hơi Vườn Cau
spots.address: 42 Đ. Xuân La, Xuân Đỉnh
spots.description: Busy with locals and lots come in after playing sports together. Lots of tables and a big area.

spots.name: Balcony Hơi (Bia Hơi Tây Hồ)
spots.address: 11 P. Trịnh Công Sơn
spots.description: Second floor has a balcony to overlook the street. Often busy with local uncles. Usually bustling.

spots.name: Bia Tây Hồ
spots.address: 3 P. Vệ Hồ, Trích Sài
spots.description: Lake View Hơi.

spots.name: Bia hơi đường tàu 41.5
spots.address: 61, Phung Hung Street, Hoan Kiem Ward
spots.seating: Indoor, Outdoor, Wooden chairs, Plastic chairs
spots.description: Bia hơi next to the train tracks

spots.name: Bia Hơi Nam Còi
spots.address: 11,Duong Thanh Street, Hoan Kiem Ward
spots.seating: Indoor, Outdoor, Plastic chairs, Plastic tables
spots.description: Local chill vibe, blue chairs and tables classic style. 14k p/beer.

spots.name: Uncle Corner Hơi (Quán Tuấn Hằng)
spots.address: 63, Hang Ma Street, Hoan Kiem Ward
spots.description: Uncle only kind of place, no tourists just locals having a quiet beer and chats. Genuine hơi experience.

spots.name: Bia Cường Béo
spots.address: 145 Đ. Võ Chí Công,
spots.description: Excellent food, fast service, cold beer

spots.name: Ta Hien Neighbor ( Bia Hơi Hưng Híp)
spots.address: 17, Luong Ngoc Quyen Street, Hoan Kiem Ward
spots.description: Touristy Hơi, 15k per cup, standard old quarter Bia hơi.

spots.name: Outback Jacks (Quán Cây Mít)
spots.address: 99, Ngõ 310 Nghi Tàm, Hong Ha Ward
spots.seating: Indoor, Outdoor, Plastic chairs, Plastic tables, Comfortable
spots.description: Beside a nice open park area, lots of space and a good breeze. Great place.

spots.name: Balcony Bamboo Hơi (Quán 175)
spots.address: 164 Đường Nước Phần Lan, Tứ Lien
spots.seating: Indoor, Wooden chairs, Metal chairs, Metal tables
spots.description: 2 Floor Hơi, top floor is a structured marquee, while underneath is a bamboo walled enclosure.

spots.name: Phương Nguyễn quán (bia Hải Phòng)
spots.address: View biển Sun Ki 1A - Cát Bà town
spots.seating: Outdoor, Plastic chairs, Metal tables, Comfortable
spots.description: Located next to the new beach of the Sunworld development. Serves cold bia hơi Hải Phòng

spots.name: Local Hơi
spots.address: Cai Beo Street
spots.description: Standard local place

spots.name: Beach Side Hơi (Trung Kiên Hơi)
spots.address: Provincial Road 356
spots.seating: Outdoor, Stools, Plastic chairs, Plastic tables, Comfortable
spots.description: Perfectly located on the seaside, lovely views. On the main road from the Cat Ba port to the town. It's 30k for a bottle of local beer, they don't serve by the cup

spots.name: Gia Bao Quan - (Venetian Hoi)
spots.address: Ngõ 1194 Đường Láng, Lang Ward
spots.description: A rare and powerful Hoi, this place overlooks a deep lake surrounded by buildings, giving off Mediterranean vibes. The lake is clean and full of giant cat fish. Very unique setting and an absolute vibe at sunset

spots.name: Bia Tiến Đạt
spots.address: Phố Trấn Vũ, Ba Dinh Ward
spots.seating: Indoor, Outdoor, Plastic chairs, Plastic tables, Comfortable
spots.description: Rooftop bia hơi with a view of the sunset across Westlake and Truc Bach lake.

spots.name: Bia hơi Hải Xồm 64
spots.address: 64 Nguyen Du Street, Cua Nam Ward
spots.seating: Indoor, Wooden chairs, Metal chairs, Comfortable
spots.description: Situated beside a small lake, this Bia hơi has two floors of seating and a lovely curved staircase in the centre of the building. It looks like an old villa that has been converted. Interesting and unique building.

spots.name: Bia 68
spots.address: Phố Quảng An, Tay Ho Ward
spots.description: Bia hơi on the edge of West lake. Popular with groups and football teams at the weekends

spots.name: Quán Hải Tồ
spots.address: Ngõ 135 Phố Đội Cấn, Ba Dinh Ward
spots.description: Street-side hơi next to Green Lake off Đội Cấn street

spots.name: Bia Hơi Nủ Na Quán
spots.address: 10, Ngõ 135 Phố Đội Cấn, Ba Dinh Ward
spots.description: A small and quaint Hơi located beside 'Green Lake'. Nearby there is a famous lake where a B-52 bomber was shot down during the American War.

spots.name: Ẩm Thực 68
spots.address: Phố Phan Kế Bính, Giang Vo Ward
spots.description: Sports-bar style with 5 big screens showing games. Koi carp pond in the centre. Tastefully decorated. Unique Hơi

reviews.txt: Classic uncle hoi, can be quite loud at times but there is a second floor balcony which overlooks the street. BE ready to shout downstairs for refills!
Downstairs is very fluorescent. Balcony isn’t bad though.
It’s ok
Busy, famous lakeside spot that is a firm favourite for bia drinkers on any night of the week
Popular street-side spot on TCS. Recently opened an indoor restaurant to accompany the outdoor seating. Sometimes show the football if it’s a big game
Mostly a relaxed hoi with comfortable chairs and big tables. Can get very busy sometimes, usually with groups coming in after playing sports together.

It's a nice location, overlooking Westlake. Open air, sturdy chairs and tables. Service can be a little slow from time to time. Only good during dry weather as there is no overhead cover at this outdoors Hơi.
Can't really say much about cleanliness as it's a streetside outdoor only Hơi.
14k per cup is a little pricey, but quality is good.
Overpriced for mid Hơi. I got a flat one but it tasted OK, just not fizzy enough. I didn't eat here, just stopped for a beer.
Wish I could give 6 stars for atmosphere. You sit in a courtyard and have loads of space. Absolute vibe. Not sure about the food but there’s a really good restaurant next door.
Very nice outdoor space
Lakeside views are very nice
Had the cơm cháy patê, was OK. Busy night, decent service.
Beautiful beach side location, with a water fountain right here. Very fruity tasting Hơi.
Stopped for a beer on the way back to accommodation, welcoming and OK beer.
Incredible vibe here.

Fantastic food and great Bia. Service is very good, lots of space for big groups, plenty of locals here enjoying the food and beers. Location is easy to get to, but it's on the main road from the airport into the city so it's quite busy. Great to watch the traffic, not as noisy as you might think.
Young enthusiastic crowd. Tofu with tomatoes was so fuckin tasty. Great views
Easily the best Tomato Tofu dish I've ever had. Beers was good, views were amazing, location is cool, lots of space to hang with friends. Overall a very good Hơi.
Classic little Hơi, local vibe. Lakeside /Street side vibes to watch the neighbourhood walk by. Cosy little place with welcoming staff and patrons.
Average Hơi, lots of space, pricey beer though at 16k per cup.

Decent hoi and food. Service can be hit and miss. Blend of locals and tays. Location is great when you can sit on the garden/lake side, but that is up to local authorities and nothing the staff can control.  Give it a go.

Very unique hoi, looks like nothing from the outside but head inside it opens up to a very nice space. Parking is available inside on the second floor. Service is so fast they bring you a bia before you finished the last. Also koi carp and football? Class

Great 'Sports Bar' hơi, lots of big TVs around to watch for sporting events. Service is rapid, beer is cold, food was good.
Bathrooms were clean, for the men's they had ashtrays and spa music playing. Automatic hand dryers too.
Really great local spot. Will come back again.

profiles.name: Woustache-Max
profiles.bio:
Founder & Admin. 
I'm passionate to document the importance of the Bia Hơi culture of Vietnam. Hơis don't have preservatives, but I will preserve the Hơi.

announcements.title: Random Button Added 🔀
announcements.body:
Random Hoi finder randomly selects one of the spots on your screen.

If there are no spots on your screen, you will be prompted to zoom out.

We recommend to zoom out to reset the buttons features each time! 🔀
